ValidationRule.description: LST - Case and Opp Owner must be the same
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: ISPICKVAL(Type ,"Field Service") && IsClosed = True && !ISBLANK(Source_Opportunity__c) && OwnerId <> Source_Opportunity__r.OwnerId
ValidationRule.errorMessage: V.RULE_CASE_028: The Case Owner and Opportunity Owner must be the same
